overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a female character from third-person perspective as she walks under a concrete overpass, along neon-lit commercial sidewalks, and across a rain-slicked intersection with holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange tactile sidewalk, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge with thick support pillars and curved beams overhead
distinctive orange textured paving tiles running the length of the pedestrian walkway
large illuminated billboard displaying Japanese characters and advertisements
modern building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with thick support pillars, creating a sheltered corridor. The camera follows the character along an orange tactile sidewalk as they emerge from under the bridge into the open neon-lit street. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance, and futuristic cars are parked along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial shopping street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk, passing various storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: female character in pink shorts walking ahead, occasionally glancing around

entered.detail: row of shops with illuminated windows and entrance signs
various glowing signs including red and blue neon advertisements
automated vending machines with distinctive green circular neon lighting
scattered garbage bags and debris along the building edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open commercial sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts and vending machines. The orange tactile paving continues, and the street is moderately busy with pedestrians moving in both directions. Various digital billboards and neon signs illuminate the scene, while trash debris is visible along the building edges.

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the intersection
futuristic black car drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the yellow crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
large rectangular concrete planter containing palm trees and greenery
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection, stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk. The space opens up significantly, revealing tall office towers in the background and holographic billboards. A sleek black futuristic car passes through the intersection as the character crosses the wet asphalt. Concrete planters with palm trees line the far side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with planters and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past concrete planters and illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: large wall-mounted holographic display showing green-tinted animated advertisements
building facade illuminated with bright green neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk, which features concrete planters with trees and large holographic advertisement walls. The orange tactile paving resumes, and the street is quieter with fewer pedestrians. Green neon lighting dominates the right side storefronts, reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection and across to a quieter commercial district. It begins beneath a massive overpass with thick support pillars, following the character along an orange tactile sidewalk as they emerge into the open light of a bustling street. As the camera moves forward, the environment expands into a commercial corridor lined with glowing storefronts, vending machines, and digital billboards. The scene then opens further as the character steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk at a wide intersection, where sleek futuristic cars glide past towering office buildings and holographic displays. Finally, the camera follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, where the atmosphere shifts toward a quieter stretch of green neon lighting and concrete planters with palm trees reflecting off the wet asphalt.
